message:
fix(engine): eliminate hash collision vulnerabilities with length-prefixed structured hashing

Audit-discovered hash collision bugs across multiple subsystems where
delimiter-based or Display-formatted hashing allowed crafted inputs to
produce identical digests for semantically different data.

Module index parity gate:
- BlockingReason now uses explicit discriminants + structured field
  encoding via append_to_hash() instead of lossy Display formatting
- SpecifierResult encodes Option discriminant to prevent None/Some("x")
  vs Some("x")/None collisions
- DecisionReceipt::seal() includes blocking_reasons.len() in hash
- InsufficientData verdict now only blocks in fail_closed mode (was
  incorrectly blocking in fail_open mode too)
- 4 regression tests added

Self-adjusting resolution graph:
- ModuleNode and DependencyEdge switched from |/-> delimiters to
  length-prefixed encoding with v2: tag
- generate_receipt_id() takes operation parameter to prevent ID
  collisions between invalidate vs remove operations
- remove_module() computes total_nodes_before for consistent count
- compute_checkpoint_hash() sorts receipts for order-independence
- 6 regression tests added

Frontier complex cartography:
- Length-prefix added to simplex_id, complex_id, diagram_id, hole_id,
  ledger_id, generator_simplex; Option discriminant for killer_simplex

Benchmark freshness gate:
- Length-prefixed fields in ShiftAlarm hash

Control plane mock inventory:
- SeamOccurrence hash now includes severity, inside_cfg_test,
  description, remediation, remediation_bead
- MockInventory sorts architectural_issues by ID before hashing

Dark matter saturation gate:
- Sorts reasons before hashing in BoardSaturationVerdict

React mismatch catalog:
- Sorts entries by entry_id on insertion and before hashing

Escape analysis certificate:
- Hash now includes schema_version, liveness, scalar_eligible,
  stack_eligible, confidence

Offline synthesis pipeline:
- Decision table, automaton, and threshold bundle hashes now incorporate
  actual content (variables, rows, states, transitions) instead of just
  ID strings

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
